## Page: Milano Sensual Congress 2026 | Europe's Leading Bachata Congress (index.html)
Description: The official Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (Nov 20-22). Europe's leading Bachata congress and the #1 Bachata Sensual event in Italy. Join world-class artists in Milan.

Milano Sensual Congress 2026 | Europe's Leading Bachata Congress

The International Choice

Europe's Premier Bachata Gathering

 The Milano Sensual Congress has evolved into a global ecosystem for Bachata enthusiasts, attracting 
more than 1000 dancers
 from 
over 20 nations
 across the continent.

English-Taught Workshops

All 30+ hours of advanced workshops and masterclasses are conducted in 
English
 by world-class artists to ensure full accessibility for our European attendees.

International Accessibility

Travel with ease with our 
dedicated direct shuttles
 from Milan Malpensa, Linate, and Bergamo airports directly to the luxury Devero Hotel venue.

European Community

Join a diverse community of high-level social dancers from Spain, France, Germany, and Switzerland in a 
World-class luxury venue
.

 Interested in our

Spring
 Bachata Congress?

 Go to Spring Website

Full Passes

Secure your spot at the best price. Prices increase
 as the event approaches. Full pass includes all workshops, shows, and parties.

 on LaSalsaDelBaile

Devero Hotel ****

Experience the congress in our 
brand new
 location. A 4-star executive hotel offering premium comfort, spa
 facilities, and direct access to the dance floors.

 New Rooms & Info

Master Classes

Level up your dancing with exclusive master classes
 from our headlining artists. Limited spots available for intimate learning.

The Team
 Behind The Magic

Organizers of the Bachata Congress Italy

Marco y Valeria

Congress Directors

@marcoyvaleria

 — International Sensual Bachata Artists with dance school established in Arcore, MB. Creators of

Milano Sensual Congress
 and its Spring Edition. With a decade of teaching and performance
 experience, they are directors of the 
Gero y Migle Project Performance Show
 in Milan, and
 Marco serves as artistic director for one of the top Latin club in Milan, the UnaMas Club.

Ale y Xidan

Congress Directors

@aleyxidan
 —
 International Sensual Bachata Artists. They founded 
AXcent
 Dance
, the first Bachata Sensual specialized school in Zurich, established in 2025. They also serve
 as judges for the International Swiss Championship for Salsa and Bachata. Ale y Xidan are the creators of

Milano Sensual Congress
 and its Spring Edition with Marco y Valeria, and are the
 co-organizers of 
Bailadoro Dance Weekend
.

Travel & Logistics

Official Transfer Service

Do you want a direct transfer from the airport or train station
 directly to our location? We have a service which is right for you.

Limited spots available. This service will be available all weekend
 at every hour of the day. 
Needs to be booked in advance.

 g.suraci@yahoo.it

Bachata Congress FAQ

 Where is the event located?

The entire event takes place at the 
New Devero Hotel & Spa

 (4
 Stars Executive), located in Cavenago di Brianza. It is easily accessible from Milan airports.

 Can I compete in the Jack & Jill?

Yes! We host an International Jack & Jill competition. Registration details
 and
 categories will be announced closer to the event date on our social media and website.

 How do I book the hotel?

Sales for the official hotel open in January 2026. Please visit our 
Hotel Page
 for the official booking link to get the group
 rate.

 Will there be day socials?

Yes, both Saturday and Sunday will have day socials only accessible for who has
 the Full Pass (not party pass).

 Are the Bachata Masterclasses taught in English?

Yes, all our international workshops, masterclasses, and main stage communications at the Milano Sensual Congress are conducted in 
English
 to accommodate our European and global attendees.

 Which airport is best for the Milano Sensual Congress?

Milan Bergamo Orio al Serio (BGY) and Milan Linate (LIN) are the closest, but Milan Malpensa (MXP) is also highly convenient. We offer 
dedicated direct transport shuttles
 from all three airports to the hotel.

---

## Page: Congressi Bachata 2026: Milano Sensual Congress | L'Evento #1 in Italia (it/index.html)
Description: Cerchi i migliori congressi bachata 2026? Il Milano Sensual Congress (20-22 Nov) è l'evento bachata leader in Italia con workshop internazionali e party esclusivi.

Congressi Bachata 2026: Milano Sensual Congress | L'Evento #1 in Italia

 Il tuo browser non supporta il tag video.

Milano
 Sensual
Congressi Bachata

 20 - 21 - 22 Novembre 2026

Il Riferimento per i Congressi Bachata 2026 Italia

Il Milano Sensual Congress è il punto di riferimento per gli amanti della bachata in Italia. Unisciti a noi per un'esperienza indimenticabile con i migliori artisti internazionali, workshop di alta qualità e feste esclusive in una location di lusso.

L'Evento Leader tra i Congressi Bachata 2026

 Il Milano Sensual Congress è diventato un ecosistema globale e un punto di riferimento tra i 
congressi bachata 2026
 in Europa, attirando 
oltre 1000 ballerini
 da 
più di 20 nazioni
.

Workshop in Inglese

Tutte le oltre 30 ore di workshop avanzati e masterclass sono tenute in 
Inglese
 da artisti di fama mondiale per garantire la piena accessibilità a tutti i partecipanti europei.

Accessibilità Internazionale

Viaggia con facilità grazie alle nostre 
navette dirette dedicate
 dagli aeroporti di Milano Malpensa, Linate e Bergamo direttamente all'hotel di lusso Devero.

Community Europea

Unisciti a una community diversificata di ballerini di alto livello provenienti da Spagna, Francia, Germania e Svizzera in una 
location di lusso internazionale
.

Gli Organizzatori del Bachata Congress Italia

Marco y Valeria

Direttori del Congresso

@marcoyvaleria

 — Artisti Internazionali di Bachata Sensual con scuola di ballo stabilita ad Arcore, MB. Creatori del

Milano Sensual Congress
 e del suo Spring Edition. Con un decennio di esperienza
 nell'insegnamento e nelle performance, sono direttori del 
Gero y Migle Project Performance
 Show
 a Milano, e Marco lavora come direttore artistico per uno dei migliori club latini a
 Milano, l' UnaMas Club.

Ale y Xidan

Direttori del Congresso

@aleyxidan
 —
 Artisti Internazionali di Bachata Sensual. Hanno fondato 
AXcent
 Dance
, la prima scuola specializzata in Bachata Sensual a Zurigo, fondata nel 2025. Oltre che
 artisti, sono giudici del Campionato Svizzero Internazionale di Salsa e Bachata. Ale y Xidan sono i
 creatori del 
Milano Sensual Congress
 e della sua Spring Edition con Marco y Valeria, e
 sono i co-organizzatori del 
Bailadoro Dance Weekend
.

FAQ del Bachata Congress

 Dove si svolge l'evento?

L'intero evento si svolge presso il 
New Devero Hotel & Spa

 (4
 Stelle Executive), situato a Cavenago di Brianza. È facilmente accessibile dagli aeroporti di Milano.

 Posso competere nel Jack & Jill?

Sì! Ospitiamo una competizione internazionale Jack & Jill. I dettagli di
 registrazione e le categorie saranno annunciati più vicino alla data dell'evento sui nostri social media e
 sul sito web.

 Come prenoto l'hotel?

Le vendite per l'hotel ufficiale aprono a Gennaio 2026. Visita la nostra 
Pagina Hotel
 per il link di prenotazione ufficiale per
 ottenere la tariffa di gruppo.

 Ci saranno social diurni?

Sì, sia Sabato che Domenica ci saranno social diurni accessibili solo a chi
 possiede il Full Pass (non il party pass).

 Le lezioni e le masterclass di Bachata sono tradotte o in inglese?

Sì, tutti i workshop internazionali, le masterclass e le comunicazioni dal palco per il Milano Sensual Congress si tengono in 
lingua inglese
 per accogliere il nostro pubblico europeo.

 Qual è l'aeroporto migliore per raggiungere il Milano Sensual Congress?

Milano Bergamo Orio al Serio (BGY) e Milano Linate (LIN) sono i più vicini, ma anche Milano Malpensa (MXP) è eccellente. Offriamo 
navette dirette prenotabili
 da tutti e tre gli aeroporti all'hotel.

---

Domande Frequenti

 Posso cambiare il nome sul mio biglietto?

Sì, i cambi di nome sono possibili. Puoi effettuare questa
 operazione direttamente sul sito web per una piccola tassa amministrativa. Gestisci la tua prenotazione
 tramite la piattaforma di biglietteria.

 Cosa mi serve per partecipare al Jack & Jill?

Per partecipare alla competizione, devi essere in possesso di
 un 
Full Pass
 valido o di un 
Full Party Pass
. La quota di iscrizione alla
 competizione è separata (€10), ma richiede uno di questi pass per essere valida.

 Posso acquistare la Masterclass
 separatamente?

No. La Masterclass è un upgrade, il che significa che

devi avere un Full Pass valido
 prima. Se acquisti l'upgrade senza un Full Pass, la tua
 partecipazione alla masterclass non sarà valida.

 Dove si svolge l'evento?

L'evento si svolge interamente presso il 
Devero
 Hotel
 a Cavenago di Brianza. Questa esclusiva struttura a 4 stelle ospita tutti i workshop, i social pomeridiani e le feste serali sotto lo stesso tetto.

---

"Masterclasses are designed for advanced dancers
 looking to elevate their technique and style. 3 hours of intensive training."

Frequently Asked Questions

 Can I change the name on my ticket?

Yes, name changes are possible. You can perform this action
 directly on the website for a small administrative fee. Please manage your booking through the ticket
 platform.

 What do I need to participate in the Jack & Jill?

To participate in the competition, you must hold a valid

Full Pass
 or a 
Full Party Pass
. The competition fee is separate (€10),
 but it requires one of these passes to be valid.

 Can I buy the Masterclass separately?

No. The Masterclass is an upgrade, which means you

must have a valid Full Pass
 first. If you purchase the upgrade without a Full Pass, your
 entry to the masterclass will not be valid.

 Where is the event located?

The event takes place entirely at the 
Devero
 Hotel
 in Cavenago di Brianza. This 4-star exclusive venue hosts all workshops, day socials, and
 night parties under one roof.

---

Description: Book your stay at Devero Hotel & Spa, the official venue for Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Luxury accommodation with direct access to dance floors and spa facilities.

Official Congress Hotel | International Bachata Festival Venue

Official
 Event Venue

Official Congress Hotel
Devero
 Hotel

Where Comfort Meets Bachata

 Book Now 

Experience the Congress
in 
Executive Style

Milano Sensual
 Congress
 brings its event to the best location to date: the 
Devero
 Hotel
, a 4-star executive hotel.

A world-class venue with incredible room quality, stylish
 spaces, premium bar, excellent service, and elegant dancing rooms. Located just outside Milano with a large
 number of free parking spots nearby. Expect state-of-the-art sound, lighting, and stage production crafted
 for dancers.

Prime Location

Largo J. F. Kennedy, 1, 20873 Cavenago di Brianza MB, Italy

Nearby Accommodation

Stay steps away in the same 4★ executive hotel as the event.

State-of-the-art sound, lighting, and staging for bachata lovers.

Luxury 4-Star Venue

Relax by the Pool

Iconic Architecture

Comfortable & Stylish Rooms

Book Your Stay

The official hotel link will provide the best rates for
 attendees. Don't miss out on staying right where the action is.

Rooms & Suites

The Devero Hotel offers spacious and elegant rooms equipped
 with
 all modern comforts. Choose between Standard, Superior rooms, or treat yourself to one of our luxury
 Suites.

 Free
 High-Speed Wi-Fi

 Air Conditioning

 Smart TV

 Minibar

Book
 Your Room

Hotel & Booking FAQ

 When do hotel sales start?

Hotel room sales will officially open in 
January
 2026
. We recommend booking as soon as the link goes live, as the main hotel sells out quickly.

 What is the official hotel?

The event takes place entirely at the 
Devero
 Hotel
, a 4-star executive hotel. All workshops, parties, and social activities are under one
 roof for maximum comfort.

 Can I change the name on the room reservation?

Yes, name changes for room reservations are possible. If you
 need to transfer your room to another attendee, please contact us or the hotel reservation desk (specific
 instructions will be provided upon booking).

Sede
 Ufficiale

Devero
Hotel

Vivi l'esperienza completa in uno
 dei migliori 
congressi bachata 2026
. Soggiorna nella stessa location dei
 workshop e delle feste.

 Prenota Ora 

Vivi il Congresso
in 
Stile Executive

Milano Sensual
 Congress
 porta il suo evento nella migliore location finora: il 
Devero
 Hotel
, un hotel executive a 4 stelle.

Una location di classe mondiale con incredibile qualità delle
 camere, spazi eleganti, bar premium, servizio eccellente e sale da ballo raffinate. Situato appena fuori
 Milano con un ampio numero di parcheggi gratuiti nelle vicinanze. Aspettatevi un suono, luci e produzione
 scenica all'avanguardia, pensati per i ballerini.

Posizione Perfetta

Situato a Cavenago di Brianza, a metà strada tra Milano
 e Bergamo. Facilmente raggiungibile dalle autostrade e dagli aeroporti.

Spa di Lusso

Rilassati dopo una lunga notte di ballo nella nostra
 esclusiva spa con piscina, sauna e bagno turco.

Ristorazione Raffinata

Goditi la deliziosa cucina italiana nel nostro
 ristorante o prendi uno spuntino veloce al bar.

Feste in piscina notturne suggestive

Location di lusso a 4 stelle

Rilassati a bordo piscina

Architettura iconica

Camere confortevoli ed eleganti

Prenota il Tuo Soggiorno

Il link ufficiale dell'hotel fornirà le migliori tariffe per i
 partecipanti. Non perdere l'occasione di soggiornare proprio dove si svolge l'azione.

Camere & Suite

Il Devero Hotel offre camere spaziose ed eleganti dotate di
 tutti i comfort moderni. Scegli tra camere Standard, Superior, o concediti una delle nostre lussuose
 Suite.

 Gratuito ad alta velocità

 Aria Condizionata

 Smart TV

 Minibar

Prenota
 la Tua Camera

FAQ Hotel & Prenotazioni

 Quando iniziano le vendite dell'hotel?

Le vendite delle camere apriranno ufficialmente a 
Gennaio 2026
. Consigliamo di prenotare non appena il link sarà attivo, poiché l'hotel principale va sold-out rapidamente.

 Qual è l'hotel ufficiale?

L'evento si svolge interamente presso il 
Devero Hotel
, un hotel executive a 4 stelle. Tutti i workshop, le feste e le attività social sono sotto lo stesso tetto per il massimo comfort.

 Posso cambiare il nome sulla prenotazione?

Sì, i cambi di nome per le prenotazioni delle camere sono possibili. Se hai bisogno di trasferire la tua camera a un altro partecipante, ti preghiamo di contattare noi o l'ufficio prenotazioni dell'hotel.

Contact Us | Milano Sensual Congress - International Bachata Support

Support

Touch

Whether you want to perform, bring your school,
 have questions about tickets, or inquire about how to be a promoter or supporting the event, we are here to
 help.

 the latest news, get notified first for special discounts and promo codes, and connect with other
 attendants.

 Get Directions

Frequently Asked Questions

 How can I contact the organizers?

You can contact us directly via WhatsApp in Italian/Spanish
 at +39 333 393 5911 or in English at +41 79 966 84 81 for any specific inquiries not covered on this
 website.

 Where exactly is the event located?

The event takes place entirely at the 
Devero
 Hotel
 in Cavenago di Brianza. This 4-star exclusive venue hosts all workshops, day socials, and
 night parties.

 How do I buy tickets?

Tickets are available through our official partner

Lasalsadelbaile.com
. You can access the purchase page directly via the "Tickets" link in
 our navigation menu.

 What is the nearest airport?

The venue is strategically located.
• 
Milan Linate
 (LIN)
 is the closest (approx. 20 mins).
• 
Milan Bergamo Orio al Serio (BGY)

 is very convenient (approx. 25 mins).
• 
Milan Malpensa (MXP)
 is about 45-50 mins away.

 social diurni e le feste serali.

## Page: Termini e Condizioni - Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (it/terms.html)
Description: Leggi i termini e le condizioni ufficiali del Milano Sensual Congress 2026, inclusi la polizza sui biglietti, la privacy policy e le regole dell'evento.

Termini e Condizioni - Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Termini e 
Policy

Si prega di leggere attentamente i nostri termini e condizioni e l'informativa sulla privacy.

1. Disposizioni Generali

I presenti Termini e Condizioni regolano la vendita dei biglietti e la partecipazione al

Milano Sensual Congress 2026
 (l'"Evento"), organizzato da 
Bachata
 Passion
 (l'"Organizzatore").

1.1 Politica dei Biglietti

Nessun Rimborso:
 Ai sensi dell'Art. 59 del Codice del Consumo italiano
 (D.Lgs. 206/2005), il diritto di recesso è escluso per i contratti di servizi per il tempo libero che
 prevedono una data o un periodo di esecuzione specifici. Pertanto, 
tutte le vendite di biglietti sono
 finali e non rimborsabili
.

Piattaforma Biglietti:
 I biglietti sono venduti tramite il nostro partner 
LaSalsaDelBaile
. Acquistando un
 biglietto, accetti anche i loro termini di servizio.

Cambi di Nome:
 I cambi di nome sono consentiti a fronte di una tassa amministrativa di

€10,00
 per biglietto. Questa operazione è consentita 
solo prima dell'inizio dell'evento
. Una volta iniziato l'evento, non verranno elaborati cambi di nome.

1.2 Accesso all'Evento e Braccialetti

Braccialetti:
 Al momento del check-in verrà applicato un braccialetto personale e non trasferibile. Esso deve essere indossato per l'intera durata dell'Evento.

Braccialetti Danneggiati/Smarriti:
 Per ricevere un braccialetto sostitutivo in caso di danneggiamento, è

necessario presentare e riconsegnare il braccialetto danneggiato
 al banco registrazioni. Se non sei in grado di presentare il braccialetto (es. smarrimento), ti sarà richiesto di

acquistare un nuovo biglietto a prezzo pieno
 per rientrare all'evento.

Diritto di Ammissione:
 L'Organizzatore si riserva il diritto di rifiutare l'ammissione o allontanare qualsiasi persona la cui condotta sia ritenuta inappropriata o che non rispetti i presenti Termini.

1.3 Foro Competente

I presenti Termini saranno regolati e interpretati in conformità con le leggi italiane. Qualsiasi controversia
 derivante da o in connessione con i presenti Termini sarà soggetta alla giurisdizione esclusiva del

Tribunale di Milano
.

Informativa sulla Privacy

Informativa resa ai sensi dell'Art. 13 del Regolamento Europeo 2016/679 (GDPR)

1. Titolare del Trattamento

Il Titolare del Trattamento è 
Bachata Passion
, con sede ad Arcore, Italia. Per
 qualsiasi richiesta riguardante la protezione dei dati, si prega di contattare: 
slamitza@gmail.com
.

2. Finalità del Trattamento

Trattiamo i tuoi dati personali (nome, cognome, email, numero di telefono) per le seguenti
 finalità:

Gestione degli acquisti dei biglietti e della registrazione all'evento.

Comunicazioni relative ad aggiornamenti dell'evento, cambi di programma o informazioni logistiche.

Adempimento degli obblighi legali e fiscali.

3. Liberatoria Media (Diritti di Immagine)

Partecipando all'Evento, concedi all'Organizzatore il diritto perpetuo, mondiale e gratuito di utilizzare la tua immagine e la tua voce che appaiono in fotografie, riprese video o altri media realizzati durante l'Evento per scopi promozionali e di marketing.

4. Conservazione dei Dati

I tuoi dati saranno conservati per il tempo strettamente necessario a compiere le finalità sopra indicate e in conformità con i periodi di conservazione civili e fiscali applicabili.

5. Diritti dell'Interessato

Ai sensi del GDPR, hai il diritto di:

Accedere ai tuoi dati personali.

Richiedere la rettifica dei dati inesatti.

Richiedere la cancellazione dei tuoi dati ("Diritto all'oblio"), fatti salvi gli obblighi legali di conservazione.

Opporti al trattamento per finalità di marketing diretto.

Per esercitare tali diritti, si prega di inviare una richiesta scritta a 
slamitza@gmail.com
.

---

## Page: Terms & Conditions - Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (terms.html)
Description: Read the official terms and conditions for Milano Sensual Congress 2026, including our ticket policy, privacy policy, and event rules.

Terms & Conditions - Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Terms & 
Policies

Please read our terms and conditions and
 privacy policy carefully.

1. General Provisions

These Terms and Conditions govern the sale of tickets and attendance at the

Milano Sensual Congress 2026
 (the "Event"), organized by 
Bachata
 Passion
 (the "Organizer").

1.1 Ticket Policy

No Refunds:
 In accordance with Article 59 of the Italian Consumer Code
 (Legislative Decree 206/2005), the right of withdrawal is excluded for leisure service contracts
 providing for a specific date or period of performance. Therefore, 
all ticket sales are
 final and non-refundable
.

Ticket Platform:
 Tickets are sold through our partner 
LaSalsaDelBaile
. By purchasing a
 ticket, you also accept their terms of service.

Name Changes:
 Name changes are permitted for an administrative fee of

€10.00
 per ticket. This action is allowed 
only before the event
 starts
. Once the event has commenced, no name changes will be processed.

1.2 Event Access & Wristbands

Wristbands:
 A personal, non-transferable wristband will be applied upon
 check-in. It must be worn for the entire duration of the Event.

Damaged/Lost Wristbands:
 To receive a replacement for a damaged wristband, you

must present and surrender the damaged wristband
 at the registration desk. If
 you are unable to present the wristband (e.g., it is lost), you will be required to

purchase a new full-price ticket
 to re-enter the event.

Right of Admission:
 The Organizer reserves the right to refuse admission or
 eject any person whose conduct is deemed disorderly or who fails to comply with these Terms.

1.3 Jurisdiction

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Italy. Any dispute
 arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of
 the 
Court of Milan
.

Privacy Policy

Information provided pursuant to Art. 13 of the European
 Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR)

1. Data Controller

The Data Controller is 
Bachata Passion
, located in Arcore, Italy. For
 any inquiries regarding data protection, please contact: 
slamitza@gmail.com
.

2. Purpose of Processing

We process your personal data (name, surname, email, phone number) for the following
 purposes:

Management of ticket purchases and event registration.

Communication regarding event updates, schedule changes, or logistical information.

Compliance with legal and tax obligations.

3. Media Release (Image Rights)

By attending the Event, you grant the Organizer the perpetual, worldwide, royalty-free
 right to use your image, likeness, and voice appearing in any photographs, video recordings, or
 other media taken during the Event for promotional and marketing purposes.

4. Data Retention

Your data will be retained for the time strictly necessary to fulfill the purposes
 outlined above and in compliance with applicable civil and fiscal retention periods.

5. Rights of the Data Subject

Under GDPR, you have the right to:

Access your personal data.

Request rectification of inaccurate data.

Request erasure of your data ("Right to be forgotten"), subject to legal retention obligations.

Object to processing for direct marketing purposes.

To exercise these rights, please send a written request to 
slamitza@gmail.com
.

---

## Page: From Social Dancer to International Artist: The Milano Sensual Jack & Jill 2026 (jacknjill.html)
Description: Join the International Bachata Jack & Jill at Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Compete for a spot in the 2027 artist lineup and more. International judges and top dancers from Europe.

From Social Dancer to International Artist: The Milano Sensual Jack & Jill 2026

Competition 2026

Unlock Your Potential:
International Jack & Jill 2026

The most anticipated Bachata competition in Europe is back. Are you ready to take the stage?

Enter Competition

Get Your Pass First

"Real growth happens under the lights." This year, the Milano Sensual Congress is not just hosting an event; we are searching for the next generation of international artists.

The 
International Jack & Jill
 at Milano Sensual Congress has always been a highlight of the weekend, but for 2026, we are raising the stakes. This isn't just a competition; it's a bridge between being a talented social dancer and becoming a recognized 
international artist
. Bringing together top dancers from all over Europe, the competition promises to be the most competitive and high-energy session of the entire festival.

A World-Class Panel

To ensure the highest standard of fairness and prestige, our jury is composed entirely of 
international masters
. These are the judges who have shaped the world of Bachata Sensual, looking for the perfect blend of connection, musicality, and technique. Whether you are coming from Spain, France, Germany, or beyond, you will be performing for the people who defined the dance.

Event Details & Registration

Mark your calendars for the grand finale: the competition will take place on 
Sunday, November 22nd
. We believe in making the stage accessible to all true lovers of the dance, which is why the entry fee is kept at only 
10 EUR
 for anyone holding a Full Pass or a Full Party Pass.

Registration is now open exclusively on 
Salsadelbaile
. Spots are strictly limited to ensure a smooth flow for all competitors, so we recommend securing your entry early to avoid missing out on the magic.

The Prizes: Your Future Starts Here

We are looking for more than just a winner—we are looking for a colleague. The top prizes for the International Jack & Jill 2026 include:

Cash Prizes
: Significant financial rewards to support your international dance journey.

Official Artist Slot for 2027
: The winner will receive an invitation to join the official artist lineup for the Milano Sensual Congress 2027.

Full Passes for Next Year
: Secure your luxury experience for our next edition with free Full Passes for the top finalists.

Beyond the prizes, competing on the Milano stage provides unmatched 
international recognition
—giving you bragging rights as a top-tier dancer on Italy's most prestigious Bachata stage.

Are You Ready to Compete?

Join the elite dancers of Europe and prove your skills on the Milano stage. Entry is just 10 EUR.

Enter Competition

Get Your Pass First

---

## Page: Bachata Events & News 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress (news.html)
Description: Stay updated with the latest Bachata news, festival guides, and dance insights from the European Bachata scene.

Bachata Events & News 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress

Bachata News 
& Festival Updates

Track the evolution of the congress and stay updated with every milestone.

April 19, 2026

Artist Spotlight: David y Inés

Mastering the fusion of technical precision and fluid motion. Discover why David Morante and Inés Ferrero are considered some of the most disciplined educators in the Bachata world.

Read Article 

April 11, 2026

The Future: Agustin y Alba

Representing the next generation of Bachata Sensual global masters. Discover how this young duo is redefining the dance scene with technical excellence and passion.

Read Article 

April 9, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Irene y Tomas

Official Bachata Sensual ambassadors trained by Korke and Judith. Experience the purity of the authentic methodology from Mallorca to Milan.

Read Article 

April 8, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Aitor Gomez

Discover the perfect harmony between Dominican roots and modern Bachata Sensual. Aitor Gomez brings his unique footwork methodology to Milan.

Read Article 

April 3, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Nacho y Silvia

Meet the rising stars of Madrid's Esencia Group. Nacho and Silvia bring fresh energy and technical mastery to the Esencia methodology in Milan.

Read Article 

April 2, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Cristian y Gabriella

Experience the surgical precision and explosive energy of Cristian y Gabriella. The Spanish masters of Technical Bachata joining us in Milan.

Read Article 

March 26, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Klau y Ros

Discover the signature Endless Bachata style of Klau y Ros. The international Bachata masters joining Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Read Article 

March 24, 2026

Artist Spotlight: Gero y Migle

Uncovering the journey and unique chemistry of the couple transforming modern Bachata with their signature "Esencia Style".

Read Article 

March 21, 2026

What to Expect from a Bachata Congress

Your ultimate guide to the magic of dance festivals. Learning from icons, social connection, and finding your style.

Read Article 

March 14, 2026

Weekly Classes vs. Congresses

How to elevate your Bachata style by perfectly combining local weekly classes and international congresses.

Read Article 

March 12, 2026

Top 5 Must-Visit Congresses in 2026

Planning your festival calendar? Here are the elite events you cannot miss this year.

Read Article 

February 11, 2026

2026 Official Flyer & Super Early Bird

The wait is over! We are thrilled to unveil the official flyer for Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Super Early Bird tickets are now available.

## Page: Agustin & Alba: The Rising Stars & Future of Bachata Sensual | Milano Sensual Congress (news/agustinyalba-bachata-sensual-rising-stars.html)
Description: Meet Agustin & Alba, the super-young duo representing the future of Bachata Sensual worldwide. Join their 2 workshops at Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Agustin & Alba: The Rising Stars & Future of Bachata Sensual | Milano Sensual Congress

Back to News

Artist Spotlight

Agustin & Alba 
Rising Stars & The Future of Bachata

Combining technical contemporary excellence with the heat of Bachata Sensual, Agustin & Alba represent the next generation of global dance masters.

"Daring to redefine the boundaries of expression in Bachata Sensual." - Agustin & Alba

In a world of established legends, 
Agustin & Alba
 have quickly risen to become one of the most exciting and talked-about couples in the international Bachata community. Based in Barcelona, the birthplace of the Sensual style, they bring a fresh, youthful energy that is literally transforming the dance floors of Europe and beyond.

The Contemporary Edge

What sets Alba apart is her extensive background in professional contemporary dance. She brings a level of body control, lines, and artistic depth that is rare in the social dance world. When combined with Agustin's natural charisma and technical mastery of Bachata Sensual, the result is a partnership that feels both incredibly modern and deeply rooted in the essence of the dance.

The Future of Bachata Sensual

They are more than just performers; they are the youngest representatives of the next generation of masters. Their style is characterized by 
extreme fluidity
, technical precision, and a unique way of interpreting the newest Bachata hits. They represent a bridge between the founding principles of Bachata Sensual and a future where artistic expression and athletic prowess go hand in hand.

Workshops at Milano Sensual Congress 2026

We are thrilled to announce that Agustin & Alba will be offering 
2 exclusive workshops
 at the Milano Sensual Congress 2026. These sessions are designed to:

- **Evolve Your Connection**: Modern lead and follow techniques.

- **Artistic Styling**: Incorporating contemporary lines into your Bachata.

- **Musical Sensitivity**: Dancing to the nuances of the song.

Don't miss the chance to learn from the future of the industry. Their energy is infectious, and their methodology is tailored for dancers who want to take their Sensual Bachata to a professional level.

Learn from the New Generation

Secure your spot for Agustin & Alba's workshops at the Devero Hotel this November.

## Page: Aitor Gomez: The Perfect Fusion of Bachata Sensual & Dominican Roots | Milano Sensual Congress (news/aitor-gomez-bachata-sensual-dominican-roots.html)
Description: Discover the unique style of Aitor Gomez. A master of Dominican footwork and Bachata Sensual, bringing his modern fusion to Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Aitor Gomez: The Perfect Fusion of Bachata Sensual & Dominican Roots | Milano Sensual Congress

Back to News

Artist Spotlight

Aitor Gomez 
Bachata Sensual & Dominican Roots

Explore the seamless connection between the soul of the Dominican Republic and the fluid movements of modern Sensual Bachata with Aitor Gomez at Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

"To understand the evolution of Bachata, one must first dance its roots." - Aitor Gomez

In the global Bachata scene, few artists possess the versatility of 
Aitor Gomez
. While many dancers specialize in either the traditional Dominican style or the modern Sensual Bachata, Aitor has carved a unique path by mastering both and finding the hidden threads that connect them.

The Dominican Soul

Aitor's foundation is built on the rhythmic complexity of Dominican Bachata. His footwork is legendary – precise, fast, and deeply musical. He brings the authentic flavor of the island to every movement, emphasizing that the "footwork" isn't just a set of steps, but a conversation with the guitar and the bongo.

Sensual Evolution

At the same time, Aitor is a prominent figure in the 
Bachata Sensual
 world. He understands the body mechanics, the isolations, and the connection required for the modern style. His workshops are unique because they don't treat these two styles as separate entities. Instead, he shows how a Sensual isolation can be enriched with traditional rhythm, and how Dominican footwork can transition smoothly into a Sensual flow.

Workshop: Modern Dominican Footwork

At the Milano Sensual Congress 2026, Aitor will lead exclusive workshops focused on his **Modern Dominican** methodology. Participants can expect to dive deep into:

- **Musicality**: Decoding the instruments of Bachata.

- **Dynamic Footwork**: Fast-paced steps with a modern aesthetic.

- **Styling**: Bringing personality and flavor to your social dancing.

Whether you are a fan of the traditional roots or the modern sensual wave, Aitor's classes provide the missing piece of the puzzle, making you a more complete and expressive dancer.

Master the Roots with Aitor

Join his workshops for a transformational experience at the Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Get Your Full Pass

## Page: Cristian y Gabriella: The Masters of Technical Bachata | Milano Sensual Congress (news/cristian-y-gabriella-bachata-world-masters-2026.html)
Description: Discover the world-class precision of Cristian y Gabriella. The Spanish Bachata masters bring their technical excellence and creative fusion to Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Cristian y Gabriella: The Masters of Technical Bachata | Milano Sensual Congress

Back to News

Artist Showcase

Cristian y Gabriella 
The Masters of Technical Bachata

Renowned for their explosive energy and surgical precision, Cristian y Gabriella represent the pinnacle of modern Bachata Fusion. Discover why they are one of the most anticipated duos at Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

"Our goal is to take the traditional essence of Bachata and elevate it through technical perfection and creative freedom." - Cristian y Gabriella

Spain has long been the epicenter of the Bachata revolution, and few couples embody this evolution better than 
Cristian y Gabriella
. Based in Seville, they have risen to international stardom not just through their competitive success, but through a teaching methodology that prioritizes the "why" behind every movement.

Competitive Excellence

Their journey is paved with gold. As winners of prestigious competitions like the 
Bachata Open
 and 
World Bachata Masters
, Cristian y Gabriella have proven their skills on the world's most demanding stages. Their routines are famous for their complexity, combining high-speed footwork with the fluid isolations characteristic of Bachata Sensual.

The 'Bachata Fusion' Methodology

What sets them apart is their unique brand of 
Bachata Fusion
. While many artists focus solely on the sensual or the traditional, Cristian y Gabriella bridge the gap. Their style is a masterclass in balance: using traditional foundation to ground explosive modern tricks and intricate musicality.

Students who attend their workshops in Milan can expect a focus on **technical body control**, **connection dynamics**, and **musical interpretation**. They don't just teach steps; they teach how to feel the music through the body's natural mechanics.

Global Influence

Beyond the stage, they are social media powerhouses, with their dance videos garnering millions of views. Their influence has shaped the way a new generation of dancers approaches the social floor, emphasizing that technical skill should always serve the connection between partners.

Train with Cristian y Gabriella

Join their exclusive workshops and witness their breathtaking performance at the Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

## Page: Gero y Migle Bachata: Discover the Masters of Esencia Style | Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (news/gero-y-migle-bachata-masters-2026.html)
Description: Discover the background, style, and unique chemistry of world-renowned Bachata artists Gero and Migle. Join their exclusive Esencia Style masterclasses at Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Gero y Migle Bachata: Discover the Masters of Esencia Style | Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Back to News

Artist Spotlight

Gero y Migle: 
Masters of Esencia Style

Uncovering the journey and unique chemistry of the couple transforming modern Bachata with their signature method.

"Energy is the soul of the dance." This philosophy has carried Gero and Migle from their diverse backgrounds in Spain and Lithuania to the pinnacle of the international Bachata scene.

In the world of 
Bachata
, few couples possess the unique blend of technical discipline and explosive charisma that defines 
Gero y Migle
. While many mistakenly categorize their dance as standard Sensual, Gero and Migle have actually developed their own distinct philosophy and movement language: the 
Esencia Style
. As we prepare for the Milano Sensual Congress 2026, we take an in-depth look at the artists who have become a global benchmark for dancers everywhere.

Esencia Style: Beyond the Labels

Gero and Migle consistently emphasize that they do not follow the standard Bachata Sensual curriculum. Instead, they have fused their extensive backgrounds—from Ballet, Modern, Hip-Hop and more—into what they call 
Esencia Style
. While it shares the fluid, connected movements often associated with modern Bachata, Esencia Style prioritizes the natural weight transfer and organic body mechanics derived from their years of multi-disciplinary training.

Gero
, hailing from the vibrant island of Ibiza, Spain, began his pursuit of movement at the age of 14. His early training was a masterclass in versatility, covering Ballet, Modern, Hip-Hop and more. This eclectic base refined his understanding of body isolation and weight transfer—skills he would later perfectly adapt to partner dancing.

Meanwhile, in Lithuania, 
Migle
 was carving her own path through folk dance, contemporary, and show dance. Her move to Madrid, the heart of the Bachata revolution, was the catalyst that transformed her technical excellence into the soulful, fluid style she is known for today.

The Gero y Migle Methodology

What sets them apart is not just their breathtaking performances, but their 
teaching methodology
. They are known for their infectious energy and a structured approach that prioritizes comfort, safety, and technical precision.

In an 
Esencia Style Workshop
, students are encouraged to find their own expression within the framework of Gero and Migle's unique methodology. They focus on the intricate lead-and-follow dynamics that allow a couple to feel "weightless" on the floor. It is this dedication to the *feeling* behind the move that has made them one of the most recognized couples in the international dance scene.

Exclusivity at Milano Sensual Congress 2026

For the 2026 edition of our congress, Gero and Migle are bringing a specially curated series of workshops to the 
Devero Hotel
. Beyond their main stage performance—which promises to be a highlight of the weekend—they will be hosting exclusive 
Esencia Style Masterclasses
. These advanced sessions will focus specifically on the 
roots of their style
, breaking down the fundamental body mechanics and philosophical origins that distinguish Esencia from other Bachata methods.

Attendees will have the rare opportunity to learn directly from the source, absorbing the nuances of their style in the premium, luxury environment that defines the Milano experience. Whether you are looking to master body rolls or perfect your connection, their presence in Milan is an opportunity not to be missed.

Dance with the Masters

Masterclasses with Gero y Migle have limited capacity. Secure your spot and join the ultimate Bachata journey in Milan.

Get Your Full Pass

View Artist Lineup

## Page: Irene y Tomas Bachata: Master the Essence of Bachata Sensual | Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (news/irene-y-tomas-bachata-sensual-masters.html)
Description: Discover the journey of Irene and Tomas, official Bachata Sensual ambassadors trained by Korke and Judith. Join their exclusive workshops at Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Irene y Tomas Bachata: Master the Essence of Bachata Sensual | Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Back to News

Artist Spotlight

Irene y Tomas: 
Pure Bachata Sensual

Representing the authentic methodology of the style's creators, Korke and Judith.

"Connection is not just about physical contact; it's about two souls moving as one." This mantra defines the world-class teaching and performance of Irene and Tomas.

In the global landscape of 
Bachata Sensual
, few couples embody the official methodology as purely as 
Irene y Tomas
. Trained directly by the creators of the style, 
Korke and Judith
, they have ascended to become official ambassadors of the Bachata Sensual brand, carrying the torch of technical excellence and organic connection to every corner of the world.

From Mallorca to the World Stage

Based in the beautiful island of Mallorca, Spain, Irene and Tomas are the founders and CEOs of 
InfiniT Dance School
. Their partnership, spanning over 8 years, has been a journey of discovery and refinement. What started as a shared passion for movement has evolved into one of the most respected teaching duos in the scene today.

Their approach is rooted in the "Roots of Bachata Sensual," focusing on the body mechanics, waves, and isolations that Korke and Judith pioneered in Cádiz. However, Irene and Tomas bring their own unique flavor—a seamless flow and a technical precision that makes their workshops a "must-attend" for any serious social dancer.

The Official Methodology

As official instructors for the 
Bachata Sensual
 organization, they don't just teach steps; they teach a language. Their pedagogy emphasizes the safety of the follower and the clarity of the leader, ensuring that the dance remains comfortable, expressive, and deeply connected.

In their workshops, you can expect a deep dive into the 
interaction dynamics
 that define the style. They break down complex "waves" and body isolations into accessible components, allowing dancers of all levels to find their own "flow" while respecting the fundamental principles of the genre.

Experience the Purity at Milano Sensual Congress 2026

We are thrilled to welcome Irene and Tomas to the 
Devero Hotel
 for the 2026 edition of the Milano Sensual Congress. Their presence promises an immersive experience into the heart of Spanish Bachata.

They will be conducting a series of 
Technical Workshops
, designed to elevate your social dancing to a professional level. Whether you are looking to master the signature Bachata Sensual connection or polish your body movement technique, learning from two of the most influential ambassadors of the style is an opportunity that comes once in a lifetime.

Join us in Milan to witness their breathtaking show and absorb the knowledge that has made them a benchmark for the new generation of Bachata dancers.

Learn from the Ambassadors

Secure your spot at the Milano Sensual Congress 2026 and experience the authentic Bachata Sensual method with Irene y Tomas.

Get Your Full Pass

View Artist Lineup

## Page: Klau y Ros: The Masters of Endless Bachata | Milano Sensual Congress (news/klau-y-ros-endless-bachata-masters-2026.html)
Description: Discover the signature Endless Bachata style of Klau y Ros. Learn about their journey from Poland and Spain to international Bachata masters joining Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Klau y Ros: The Masters of Endless Bachata | Milano Sensual Congress

Back to News

Dance Journey

Klau y Ros 
Endless Bachata Masters

Discover the signature Endless Bachata style of Klau y Ros. Learn about their journey from Poland and Spain to international Bachata masters joining Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

"Endless Bachata is more than just a combination of steps—it is extreme fluidity, intense musical connection, and emotional storytelling." - Klau y Ros

This November, the Milano Sensual Congress 2026 proudly welcomes one of the most dynamic and sought-after Bachata sensual duos in the world: 
Klau y Ros
. Known globally for their signature 
Endless Bachata
 methodology, they bring a distinct flavor to the dance floor that has captivated students and performers alike.

The Origins: A Global Journey

Klau (Klaudia Perdek)
 brings an extensive competitive background. Starting at age eight with ballet and salsa, she holds podium finishes in major championships such as the World Latin Cup and BachatArt. Her extreme technical precision is a hallmark of their style.

Adrián Ros
 complements this precision with deep structural knowledge. Originating from Galicia, Spain, Ros started with sport dance and Cuban salsa in 2005. By 2014, he was expanding into fundamental styles and later refined his stage presence under top professionals like Marco y Sara in Madrid.

The 'Endless Bachata' Academy

Now based in Orlando, Florida, the duo runs the highly successful 
Endless Bachata Academy
. Their teaching philosophy emphasizes seamless, non-stop movement where the conclusion of one figure effortlessly breathes into the beginning of another.

Their approach strips away chaotic arm-work, favoring deep body isolations, grounded weight transfers, and musicality that connects partners in a profound, uninterrupted flow.

Learn from Klau y Ros Live

They will be teaching exclusive masterclasses and performing their latest routines at the Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

Get Your Full Pass

## Page: Milan Bachata Travel Guide 2026: Airports, Transfers & Local Tips (news/milan-bachata-travel-guide-2026.html)
Description: Planning your trip to Milano Sensual Congress 2026? Read our complete travel guide for bachata dancers: airports, official shuttles, and how to navigate Milan.

Milan Bachata Travel Guide 2026: Airports, Transfers & Local Tips

Travel Tips

Milan Bachata Travel Guide 2026

Navigating Milan for the Milano Sensual Congress: Airports, Official Shuttles, and Local Secrets.

Arriving in Milan, Italy

 Milan is perfectly positioned as a central European hub. Whether you are flying from London, Madrid, Berlin, or beyond, getting to the 
Milano Sensual Congress 2026
 is straightforward.

Malpensa (MXP)

The main international gateway. Frequent trains and our official MSC shuttles connect directly to the venue.

Linate (LIN)

Closest to the city center. Fast and convenient for European flights.

Bergamo Orio (BGY)

Hub for Ryanair and low-cost carriers. Easy shuttle access for budget-conscious dancers.

Official MSC Shuttles

 Don't worry about expensive taxis or complex bus routes. We offer 
Official MSC Transfer Services
 on Thursday and Friday.

Direct from airport terminals to Devero Hotel.

Meet and greet with our staff.

Secure luggage handling.

Book Transfer Now

The Venue: Devero Hotel & Spa

 The congress takes place at the luxury 4-star executive **Devero Hotel** in Cavenago di Brianza. Located just 20 minutes from Milan, it offers a secluded, high-end environment perfect for intensive workshops and all-night parties. If you stay on-site, you take the elevator directly to the workshops—the ultimate bachata luxury.

Quick Travel Tips for Bachata Dancers

Milan Transport:
 Download the ATM Milano app for city trains and subways.

Power Adapters:
 Italy uses Type F and L plugs. Most hotels are compatible with standard European Type C.

Dance Shoes:
 Our venue features premium parquet and professional dance floors. Bring your best suede soles.

---

## Page: Nacho y Silvia: The Rising Stars of Bachata Esencia | Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (news/nacho-y-silvia-bachata-esencia-new-generation.html)
Description: Experience the energy of the new generation. Nacho and Silvia bring their signature Esencia Style from Madrid to Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Discover their journey.

Nacho y Silvia: The Rising Stars of Bachata Esencia | Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Back to News

Artist Spotlight

Nacho y Silvia: 
The Evolution of Esencia Style

Meet the Madrid-based duo who are redefining the boundaries of Esencia Style with fresh energy and technical mastery.

"Dance is a conversation between two souls." This belief drives Nacho and Silvia, the rising stars of the global Bachata scene and prominent members of the Esencia Group.

In the vibrant dance studios of 
Madrid
, a new movement is taking shape. At the forefront of this evolution are 
Nacho y Silvia
, a couple whose technical precision and creative flair have marked them as key artists in the modern Bachata scene. As representatives of the elite 
Esencia Group
, they stand alongside legends like Marco y Sara and Gero y Migle, continuing the legacy of deep connection and organic movement.

The Madrid Connection: Rooted in Excellence

Growing up in the epicenter of the Bachata revolution, Nacho and Silvia have been immersed in the most advanced methodologies from the beginning. Their training is a testament to the high standards of the Madrid scene, blending the traditional foundations of Bachata with the modern, fluid transitions of 
Esencia Style
.

Being part of the Esencia Group means more than just sharing a name; it involves a shared commitment to the 
Esencia methodology
. Nacho and Silvia consistently work with the movement's pioneers to refine their understanding of weight transfer, body mechanics, and the psychological connection between partners.

Defining their Artistic Vision

What makes Nacho and Silvia truly special is their ability to bridge the gap between established technique and fresh, contemporary energy. They bring a youthful vitality to their workshops that resonates with dancers of all levels. Their style is characterized by 
explosive speed
 balanced with 
momentary stillness
, creating a dynamic rhythm that is both exciting to watch and incredibly fun to dance.

Their impact on the Madrid community has already been significant, and now they are expanding their reach to the global stage, proving that the future of Esencia Style is in very capable hands.

Featured Workshops at Milano Sensual Congress 2026

We are thrilled to welcome Nacho y Silvia to the 
Devero Hotel
 for their debut at the Milano Sensual Congress. They will be leading a series of intensive 
Esencia Style Workshops
, designed to help dancers unlock more fluid movements and build a stronger, more intuitive connection with their partners.

This is a rare opportunity to learn the latest evolutions of Esencia Style from the artists who are living and breathing it every day in Madrid. Whether you want to master intricate footwork or understand the subtle nuances of leading and following, Nacho and Silvia's presence in Milan will be a transformative experience for your dance journey.

Learn from Nacho y Silvia

Nacho y Silvia's workshops are expected to fill up quickly. Secure your spot now and experience the future of Bachata in Milan.

## Page: Top 5 Must-Visit Bachata Congresses in Europe 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress (news/top-5-bachata-congresses-europe-2026.html)
Description: Our expert guide to the top 5 Bachata festivals in Europe for 2026. Discover why Milano Sensual, Bachaturo, and others are the must-visit events this year.

Top 5 Must-Visit Bachata Congresses in Europe 2026 | Milano Sensual Congress

Festival Guide

Top 5 Must-Visit 
Bachata Congresses
 in Europe 2026

The ultimate roadmap for every Bachata lover planning their European dance tour this year.

The European Bachata scene is more vibrant than ever. As we look towards 2026, several festivals have established themselves as the "titans" of the industry, offering unparalleled workshop quality, majestic venues, and social parties that last until sunrise.

If you're looking to upgrade your dancing, meet the world's top artists, and experience the pure joy of Bachata Sensual, these are the five festivals you need to have on your radar for 2026.

1. Milano Sensual Congress (Milan, Italy)

Opening the list is Italy's crown jewel: the 
Milano Sensual Congress
. Known for its "All-in-One" luxury concept, this event takes place at the prestigious Devero Hotel. It has become synonymous with executive-level comfort and a strictly curated lineup of the best 
Bachata Sensual
 masters in the world.

What sets Milan apart is the atmosphere. It's not just a festival; it's a social hub where high fashion meets high-level dancing in a venue that makes you feel like a VIP from the moment you check in.

2. Bachaturo (Warsaw, Poland)

No European list is complete without 
Bachaturo
. It is often cited as one of the largest festivals in the world. While it covers Salsa and Kizomba, its Bachata section is legendary, attracting thousands of dancers from every corner of the globe.

Expect massive workshop rooms, a lineup that includes every major artist you've ever seen on Instagram, and parties so large they feel like a stadium event. It's a rite of passage for every Bachatero.

3. BSWC - Bachata Sensual World Congress (Huelva, Spain)

The official congress of 
Bachata Sensual
 takes place in its spiritual home: Huelva. This event is a deep dive into the essence of the style, organized by the creators Korke and Judith themselves. It is where the most advanced techniques are shared and the future of the dance is shaped.

If you want to experience the authentic roots and learn from the pioneers in an atmosphere of pure passion, the BSWC is an unmissable pilgrimage for every serious Bachatero.

4. Fever Bachata World Congress (Gandia, Spain)

Located in the beautiful coastal city of Gandia, 
Fever Bachata
 offers the ultimate "Summer Holiday" vibe. Taking place in a resort-style setting, it combines the beach, the sun, and non-stop Bachata Socials.

It’s famous for its pool parties and the proximity to the birthplace of many Spanish artists, giving it an authentic "Sabor" that is hard to replicate elsewhere.

5. Geneva Festival (Geneva, Switzerland)

Finishing our top 5 is the 
Geneva Festival
. Switzerland’s premier Bachata event is known for its elegance and high-profile international guests. It offers a more intimate yet extremely high-level experience compared to the massive scale of Bachaturo.

The attention to detail and the beautiful city of Geneva make this a favorite for those who want to combine a beautiful travel experience with world-class workshops.

Start Your Journey in Milan

Join us for the 2026 edition of the Milano Sensual Congress. Experience luxury, passion, and the best Bachata Sensual in Europe.

Book Your Full Pass Now

---

## Page: Weekly Classes vs. Congresses: How to Elevate Your Bachata Style | Milano Sensual Congress (news/weekly-classes-vs-bachata-congresses.html)
Description: Discover the difference between learning Bachata at weekly classes versus congresses. Learn why classes build foundation, but congresses develop your unique style.

Weekly Classes vs. Congresses: How to Elevate Your Bachata Style | Milano Sensual Congress

Back to News

Dance Journey

Weekly Classes 
vs. Congresses

How to elevate your Bachata style by perfectly combining the two completely different learning experiences.

"I go to classes twice a week, do I really need to go to a congress?" This is one of the most common questions from dedicated dancers. The truth is, while both are essential, they serve completely different purposes in your journey to elevating your Bachata.

Whether you're looking to turn heads on the social floor or just feel more confident in your movements, understanding how to utilize both weekly classes and international 
Bachata Congresses
 is the secret key used by all advanced dancers.

The Role of Weekly Classes: Building the Foundation

Your local dance school is your laboratory. Weekly classes provide the absolute necessity of repetition, muscle memory, and timing. It's here that you drill the basics until they run perfectly on autopilot.

In a typical weekly class, your instructors are focused on 
fundamental techniques
. You build a vocabulary of standard patterns, learn the essential weight transfers, and figure out how to navigate the local social dance floor. Weekly classes are non-negotiable for establishing a strong, technically sound foundation.

The Congress Experience: Absorbing Style & Signature Moves

If weekly classes are where you learn the alphabet, a 
Bachata Congress
 is where you learn poetry. Congresses are not about drilling the basic step for an hour; they are an immersive, high-energy environment designed to inspire and challenge you.

When you take a 
Bachata Workshop
 at a major international event, you aren't just learning "a combination". You are learning the specific flavor and identity of world-class 
Bachata Artists
. Each artist brings their own unique body movement, musicality, and 
signature moves
 that define their style.

By absorbing these nuances from different masters—say, adopting the sharp musicality of one couple and the fluid body isolations of another—you begin to transcend the "standard script" you learned back home.

No Dancer is Complete Without Multiple Influences

The ultimate goal in Bachata is not to become a perfect carbon-copy clone of a single teacher. The goal is to 
create your own style
. You cannot do this by only ever seeing the interpretations of the instructors in your hometown.

Attending 
Bachata Festivals
 exposes you to a myriad of styles from across Europe and the globe. You might discover that while you learned a strict framework at home, your body naturally resonates with a more fluid, dynamic approach you learned from an artist in Milan or Madrid.

By gathering small pieces—a hand toss here, a head roll technique there—from a variety of masters, you synthesize these elements into a style that is distinctly yours.

Elevate Your Dance in Milan

Ready to absorb the style of the absolute best in the world? Join us at the Milano Sensual Congress and start building your unique dance identity.

Secure Your Full Pass

---

## Page: What to Expect from a Bachata Congress | Milano Sensual Congress (news/what-to-expect-bachata-congress-2026.html)
Description: Discover what to expect at a Bachata congress in 2026. Learn about workshops, social dancing, and why learning from international artists is vital.

What to Expect from a Bachata Congress | Milano Sensual Congress

Experience Guide

What to Expect from a 
Bachata Congress

Your ultimate roadmap to navigating the magic, the learning, and the social connection of a world-class dance event.

Entering your first Bachata congress is like opening a door to a new dimension. The music is louder, the energy is electric, and for three days, the entire world revolves around the dance floor. But what should you really expect as we head into the 2026 season?

Whether you're a seasoned professional or a curious beginner, a Bachata congress offers an experience that transforms not just your dancing, but your connection to the global community.

1. Learning Beyond Your Teacher: The Artist's Style

While your local dance school provides the essential foundation, a congress is where you find your 
soul
 in the dance. It's vital to learn directly from the 
styles of international artists
, not only from your local instructors. Every artist brings a unique interpretation of the music—a certain "sabor"—that cannot be fully captured in a weekly class.

By immersing yourself in different styles, you begin to pick up subtle nuances: a specific hip movement, a hand styling, or a way of phrasing the music. This exposure is what allows you to develop your own unique dance identity.

2. A Space for Every Level

One of the biggest myths is that you need to be an "expert" to attend a congress. In reality, 
people of any level can participate
. World-class events like the 
Milano Sensual Congress 2026
 are specifically designed with inclusivity in mind. There is a room and a schedule for every experience level.

From absolute beginners taking their very first steps to master-level workshops for professional performers, the curriculum is structured so that everyone feels challenged yet comfortable. Don't let your "level" hold you back—the congress is where levels are leveled up!

3. The Social Floor: Where Practice Meets Passion

The daytime is for learning, but the night is for 
social dancing
. Imagine a floor filled with hundreds of people who share your passion. This is the heart of the experience: practicing everything you've learned in a vibrant, supportive environment.

Social dancing is about more than just steps; it's about 
meeting people
. You will dance with strangers who become friends, share laughs over a missed turn, and experience the pure joy of connection. In 2026, the social scene is expected to be more diverse than ever, with dancers flying in from every corner of the globe.

4. Why Milano Sensual Congress 2026?

If you're looking for the perfect example of this experience, look no further than Milan. Known for its "All-in-One" luxury concept at the Devero Hotel, it combines elite-level workshops with a social atmosphere that is legendary in the industry.

It’s the place where style, level-inclusivity, and social connection come together in a perfectly curated weekend. Whether it's your first congress or your fiftieth, Milan promises an experience that sets the bar for what a dance festival should be.

Ready to Experience It?

Join us for the 2026 edition of the Milano Sensual Congress. Elevate your style, meet the community, and dance your heart out.

Book Your Full Pass Now

---

## Page: Transfer Service | Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (transfer.html)
Description: Official transfer service for Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Book your ride from Malpensa, Linate, Bergamo, or Milano Centrale to Devero Hotel.

Transfer Service | Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Official Transfer Service

Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Do you want a direct transfer from the
 airport or train station directly to our location? We have a service which is right for you. Enjoy a
 comfortable and stress-free journey to the Devero Hotel.

Airport Transfer

to Devero Hotel

## Page: Da Social Dancer ad Artista Internazionale: Il Jack & Jill del Milano Sensual Congress 2026 (it/jacknjill.html)
Description: Partecipa al Jack & Jill internazionale di Bachata al Milano Sensual Congress 2026. Competi per un posto nella lineup degli artisti 2027. Giudici internazionali e i migliori ballerini d'Europa.

Da Social Dancer ad Artista Internazionale: Il Jack & Jill del Milano Sensual Congress 2026

Competizione 2026

Libera il Tuo Potenziale:
Jack & Jill Internazionale 2026

La competizione di Bachata più attesa in Europa è tornata. Sei pronto a salire sul palco?

Partecipa alla Gara

Acquista il Tuo Pass

"La vera crescita avviene sotto le luci." Quest'anno, il Milano Sensual Congress non ospita solo un evento; stiamo cercando la prossima generazione di artisti internazionali.

L'
International Jack & Jill
 al Milano Sensual Congress è sempre stato un punto culminante del weekend, ma per il 2026 stiamo alzando la posta in gioco. Questa non è solo una competizione; è un ponte tra l'essere un talentuoso social dancer e il diventare un 
artista internazionale
 riconosciuto. Riunendo i migliori ballerini di tutta Europa, la competizione promette di essere la sessione più competitiva e carica di energia dell'intero festival.

Una Giuria di Classe Mondiale

Per garantire il massimo standard di equità e prestigio, la nostra giuria è composta interamente da 
maestri internazionali
. Sono proprio i giudici che hanno plasmato il mondo della Bachata Sensual a cercare il mix perfetto di connessione, musicalità e tecnica. Sia che tu provenga da Spagna, Francia, Germania o oltre, ti esibirai davanti alle leggende che hanno definito questo ballo.

Dettagli dell'Evento e Registrazione

Segna sul calendario il gran finale: la competizione si svolgerà 
Domenica 22 Novembre
. Crediamo nel rendere il palco accessibile a tutti i veri amanti del ballo, motivo per cui la quota di iscrizione è di soli 
10 EUR
 per chiunque possieda un Full Pass o un Full Party Pass.

Le iscrizioni sono ora aperte esclusivamente su 
Salsadelbaile
. I posti sono strettamente limitati per garantire un flusso agevole per tutti i concorrenti, quindi ti consigliamo di assicurarti l'iscrizione in anticipo per non perdere la magia.

I Premi: Il Tuo Futuro Inizia Qui

Cerchiamo più di un semplice vincitore: cerchiamo un collega. I primi premi per l'International Jack & Jill 2026 includono:

Premi in Denaro
: Importanti premi pecuniari per supportare il tuo percorso professionale internazionale.

Slot Artist Ufficiale 2027
: Il vincitore riceverà un invito ufficiale per unirsi alla lineup degli artisti del Milano Sensual Congress 2027.

Full Pass per l'Anno Prossimo
: Assicurati l'esperienza di lusso per la prossima edizione con pass gratuiti per i finalisti.

Oltre ai premi materiali, competere sul palco di Milano offre un 
riconoscimento internazionale
 senza pari—un'occasione unica per affermarsi come ballerino d'élite nel congresso più prestigioso d'Italia.

Sei Pronto a Gareggiare?

Unisciti ai ballerini d'élite d'Europa e dimostra le tue abilità sul palco di Milano. L'iscrizione costa solo 10 EUR.

Partecipa alla Gara

Acquista Prima il Tuo Pass

## Page: David y Inés: The Masters of Technical Precision & Fluidity | Milano Sensual Congress (news/david-y-ines-bachata-sensual-masters-2026.html)
Description: Meet David Morante and Inés Ferrero, the Spanish bachata icons bringing technical rigor and fluidity to Milano Sensual Congress 2026.

David y Inés: The Masters of Technical Precision & Fluidity | Milano Sensual Congress

"Our goal is to transform technical rigor into pure, fluid emotion on the dance floor." - David & Inés

In the landscape of international Bachata, few couples command as much respect for their technical discipline as David Morante and Inés Ferrero. Based in Spain, their journey from founders of the renowned "Marimba" dance school to global icons is a testament to their unwavering commitment to the art of movement.

The Sports Background Edge

What truly distinguishes David y Inés is their foundation in competitive sports. This background infuses their dancing with a level of precision, athleticism, and body control that is rare in the social dance world. Every movement is calculated yet feels effortless, creating a visual harmony that has captivated audiences from Europe to Latin America.

Masters of Bachata Fusion

While deeply rooted in the principles of Bachata Sensual, they have pioneered a style that seamlessly blends the heat of the Sensual style with the technical rigor of contemporary fusion. This "Fusion" approach allows for greater musical interpretation and a dynamic range of expression, making their performances some of the most anticipated in the circuit.

Workshops at Milano Sensual Congress 2026

We are honored to have David y Inés conducting two specialized workshops designed for dancers who want to bridge the gap between social dancing and professional performance levels:

- Technical Body Control: Breaking down the mechanics of isolation and fluid transitions.
- Dynamic Connection: High-level lead and follow techniques for complex fusion patterns.

Their pedagogical approach is highly structured, ensuring that every student leaves with a deeper understanding of the "why" behind the "how."

Elevate Your Technique

Don't miss the chance to learn from the Spanish masters at the Devero Hotel this November.

Get Your Full Pass

---
